verses.text: Amaute in, “Hong pai un, Topa kiangah ciahkik ni; amah in eite hong balgawp hangin hong damsakkik ding a, eite hong liamsak hangin i liammate hong tunsakkik ding hilo ahi hiam
Ni nih sungin eite hong thahatsak ding a, ni thum sungin i ngei hong bangsak ding hi. Tua ciangin amah tawh i kikhawl ding hi

Topa i theihzawhna dingin hanciam ni. Zingsang sialin pelloin khua a vak mah bangin pelloin eite kiangah amah hong pai ding a, lei a kawtsak khuapi guah pelloin hong zuk bangin eite kiangah amah hong pai hamtang ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi
Israel leh Judah aw, note bang hong cih thei nawn ding ka hi hiam? Note' hong itna pen zingsang meiilum bangin thengpak a, a mangthangpak daitui tawh kibang lel hi
Tua ahih manin note a hong thuhilh ding leh note a hong taai dingin ka kamsangte kong sawl hi. No ka mite' gamtat ding ka deih zia kitel sinsen hi
Keima deih pen nong it tawntung ding uh hizaw a, gan tawh nong biakna uh ka deih pen hilo zaw hi. Gan tawh nong biakna uh sangin kei nong theih ding uh ka deihzaw hi
Ahi zongin ka ciamna gam a tun' uh ciangin amaute in Adam khua-ah ka thuciamna palsat uh a, kei tungah hong thumanlo uh hi
Gilead pen migilo hontangte' omna khuapi hi a, mi thahna sisan luang tawh amau' sul a kidim hi
Zawhthawh thu-in mi' na a sut dingin a pangsim mite bangin siampite gamta uh a, biakna a pia dingin Shekhem khua-ah a pai mite nangawn, lamkalah a that uh hi. Amau gamtatna siahuai mahmah hi
Israel mite lakah siatna lianpi khat ka mu hi. Milim biakna tawh amaute kininsak uh hi
No Judah mite zong gim kong piak ding hun kiseh khinzo hi.
